title: UniversalTransactionRequest
description: Transaction object passed to pushChainClient.universal.sendTransaction(). Routing is determined by the shape of 'to' and 'from' fields.

oneOf.description: Plain address triggers Push Chain execution (Route 1)
Object with address and chain triggers external chain execution (Route 2)

address.description: Target contract or EOA address on the external chain

chain.description: Chain identifier from PushChain.CONSTANTS.CHAIN (e.g., 'eip155:11155111' for Ethereum Sepolia)

to.description: Defines the execution target. Plain address = Push Chain. Object with chain = external chain.

from.description: Optional. When set to an external chain, execution uses the Chain Executor Account (CEA) for that chain as the transaction origin (Route 3).

value.description: Native value to send as BigInt string. On Push Chain this is uPC (smallest unit, like wei). On external routes, maps to native asset of that chain.

oneOf.description: ABI-encoded calldata for a single call
Array of ABI-encoded calldata for batched multicall payload

data.description: Calldata for contract interaction. String for single call, Array for multicall batch.

funds.description: Moves supported assets as part of the transaction flow. Asset movement and execution happen atomically when tx.data is provided.

amount.description: Amount to move as BigInt string

token.description: Token identifier from PushChain.CONSTANTS.MOVEABLE.TOKEN. If omitted, defaults to native asset.

progressHook.description: Callback function to receive progress updates during transaction lifecycle. Type: (progress: ProgressHookType) => void
